category_sources: Official Scalasca Cube documentation describes Cube/CubeLib as CUBE components for performance reports and command-line tools.
source_facts.description says cubelib is a performance report explorer for Scalasca and Score-P.
display_name_sources: Official Cube 4.x documentation uses CubeLib for the C++ library component.
docs_sources: Official FZ Juelich Scalasca release docs provide Cube command-line tools and CubeLib-derived metrics documentation.
Official Scalasca Cube 4.x documentation page links installation, user guide, derived metrics, and command-line tools guides.
repo_sources: Official Scalasca/FZ Juelich sources present CubeLib as source-code distribution downloads, but no official public source-control repository was identified; repo is left empty rather than using a mirror.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was researched.
tags_sources: Official Cube documentation describes CUBE components and command-line tools for performance data.
source_facts.description identifies Scalasca and Score-P performance report exploration.
